action_set_definitions.name: get_home_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry data from the home environment sensors including temperatures, energy levels, and time.

action_set_definitions.name: set_passive_controls
action_set_definitions.description: Configures the motorized shading and electrochromic glazing to control solar heat gain.

shading_level.description: Motorized shading level from 0.0 (fully retracted) to 1.0 (fully deployed).

action_set_definitions.name: set_hvac_power
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the active power draw for the HVAC cooling system.

power_kw.description: Target power for cooling in kilowatts (kW).

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the world model simulation by a specific time increment to see the result of actions.

state_description.indoor_temperature: The current temperature inside the house in degrees Celsius.
state_description.outdoor_temperature: The current temperature outside the house in degrees Celsius.
state_description.battery_soc: The current State of Charge (SoC) of the home energy storage system, as a percentage (0-100).
state_description.solar_output: The current power being generated by solar panels in kilowatts (kW).
state_description.grid_price: The current price of electricity from the grid in USD per kWh.
state_description.current_time: The current simulated time in 24-hour format (HH:MM).
state_description.hvac_power_consumption: The current power draw of the HVAC system in kW.
